summary: BUG-192-001 (navigation away from /anomalies) is STILL PRESENT in v192-fix. The InlineAiPanel infinite loop fix (commit 7f6d2e8) did NOT resolve the root navigation block. Sidebar clicks from /anomalies call preventDefault but do not invoke pushState — the route change never happens. All other pages work correctly.
primary_fix_note: BUG-192-001: After visiting /anomalies, clicking ANY sidebar link (Dashboard, Clusters, etc.) does NOT navigate away. URL stays /anomalies, page content unchanged. Confirmed via: (1) browser act click, (2) JS element.click(), (3) keyboard Enter on focused link — all fail. pushState is never called. The infinite loop is gone (stable console), but the navigation block persists.

bugs.title: Navigation away from /anomalies is blocked
bugs.description: Clicking any sidebar link while on /anomalies does nothing. The React Router's onClick calls preventDefault (confirmed), but history.pushState is never called. Route change does not occur. Page stays on /anomalies.
bugs.repro: 1. Navigate to /anomalies. 2. Click any sidebar link (Dashboard, Clusters, Settings, etc.). 3. Nothing happens — stays on /anomalies.
bugs.root_cause_hypothesis: The InlineAiPanel fix (commit 7f6d2e8) stopped the infinite loop but something on the /anomalies page is still blocking navigation via React Router's internal logic. Possible useBlocker or router blocker state still active.
bugs.fix_hint: Check if InlineAiPanel (or its parent) still has a useBlocker or router blocker hook mounted. The blocker may be preventing navigation even without the loop.

bugs.title: tRPC batched route 404: events.list + ai.keySettingsStatus combo
bugs.description: The batched tRPC call including events.list,clusters.live,clusters.list,metrics.currentStats,alerts.unacknowledgedCount,ai.keySettingsStatus returns 404. This causes polling retries on every page load.
bugs.repro: Open browser console on any page, see repeating 404 errors for the batch endpoint.
bugs.fix_hint: Check if ai.keySettingsStatus endpoint exists on the backend — it may be missing from the router.

bugs.title: presence.subscribe SSE stream dropping periodically
bugs.description: ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING on /trpc/presence.subscribe every ~60-80 seconds. SSE reconnects automatically but causes console noise.
bugs.repro: Open browser console, wait 2 minutes, observe periodic presence.subscribe ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING.

dashboard.notes: Loads with real data: 1 node, 13/13 pods, 2 clusters, 12 anomalies. Stats, charts, recent events all displayed. Navigation FROM dashboard works.

anomalies_page_load.notes: Page loads correctly with 12 anomalies, table with severity/type/cluster/title/detected/status columns, filter dropdowns (severity/status/cluster) all work.

anomalies_navigation_away.notes: CRITICAL: BUG-192-001 still present. Clicking Dashboard/Clusters/Settings from sidebar while on /anomalies does NOT navigate. pushState not called.

clusters_page.notes: Loads 2 clusters (prod-cluster-eks: Error, test-cluster-minikube: Healthy). Table with name/provider/health/access/version/nodes/endpoint/last-seen all working.

cluster_detail.notes: Overview/Nodes/Pods/Services/Deployments/Events/Metrics tabs all work. Real data: 1 node, 13 pods across 3 namespaces (ingress-nginx, kube-system, voyager).

settings_tabs.notes: General (cluster connection, platform info), AI Configuration (BYOK form), API Tokens (9 tokens listed), Clusters — all tabs work.

dark_mode.notes: Theme toggle works, dark mode renders cleanly with proper contrast.

feature_flags.notes: 3 flags with targeting rules and activity logs. audit_log_enabled ON, sse_subscriptions ON, webhook_deliveries_ui OFF.

webhooks.notes: Empty state renders correctly with Add Webhook CTA.

users.notes: 2 users shown (Voyager Admin + Viewer User), user management table works.

ai_assistant.notes: Page loads, shows BYOK lock state. Analyze Health, Show Recommendations, Explain Events buttons present.

inline_ai_panel_loop.notes: No infinite loop observed. Console errors are stable (no rapid-fire requests from InlineAiPanel). The specific fix of commit 7f6d2e8 for the infinite loop IS working.

breakdown.inline_loop_fix: 0/0.5 (loop fixed, but nav still broken = partial credit not given)
